basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow / Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Online through the official IIT Hyderabad website. The last date to submit the application form is 08-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: As per Government rules for reserved categories.

qualification.education_qualification: BE/BTech in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10 for JRF; ME/MTech/MS in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10 at both UG and PG level for SRF.
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): BE/BTech in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): ME/MTech/MS in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10 at both at UG and PG level.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Senior Research Fellow (SRF)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Senior Research Fellow (SRF)

salary_details.pay_scale: JRF: Rs. 37,000 pm for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000 pm for 3rd Year. SRF: Rs. 42,000 pm. HRA as per GOI norms will be additional.
salary_details.details: JRF: Rs. 37,000 pm for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000 pm for 3rd Year. SRF: Rs. 42,000 pm. HRA as per GOI norms will be additional.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF) or Senior Research Fellow (SRF)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow (JRF): BE/BTech in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10. Senior Research Fellow (SRF): ME/MTech/MS in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10 at both at UG and PG level.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: As per Government rules for reserved categories.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: JRF: Rs. 37,000 pm for 1st and 2nd year and Rs. 42,000 pm for 3rd Year. SRF: Rs. 42,000 pm. HRA as per GOI norms will be additional.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad JRF/SRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions at IIT Hyderabad is 08 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this IIT Hyderabad recruitment?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts in the current IIT Hyderabad recruitment drive. This project-based position offers a valuable research opportunity.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for these JRF/SRF posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions at IIT Hyderabad is online. Interested candidates need to apply through the Google form as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the JRF/SRF positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) posts is 28 years. Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Government of India norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at IIT Hyderabad?
faq.answer: For Junior Research Fellows (JRF), the salary is Rs. 37,000 per month for the 1st and 2nd year, and Rs. 42,000 per month for the 3rd year. HRA will be provided in addition to the fellowship as per GOI norms.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post?
faq.answer: Candidates for the Senior Research Fellow (SRF) post must have an ME/MTech/MS in Metallurgical Engineering/Materials Science and Engineering/Mechanical Engineering/Chemical Engineering with a minimum CGPA of 8 out of 10 at both UG and PG levels.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Hyderabad JRF/SRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is explicitly mentioned in the official notification for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) recruitment at IIT Hyderabad. Candidates should still verify this detail in the full notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these research positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions at IIT Hyderabad primarily involves an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their applications and called for an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for the JRF/SRF posts?
faq.answer: The job location for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) / Senior Research Fellow (SRF) positions is Sangareddy, Telangana, specifically at the Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad campus. It's a project-based role in a research environment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIT Hyderabad for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for the Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad is www.iith.ac.in. Candidates can visit this website for more details about the institute and to find the official notification and application link for the JRF/SRF recruitment.
